intro: Curated interview-prep and engineering notes I maintain, plus papers I often revisit for embeddings and ML systems.

repos.title: ML Interview Hub
repos.description: Real-world AI/ML interview Q&A—LLMs, computer vision, RAG, agents, traditional ML, system design, and more.

repos.title: Software Engineering Blogs
repos.description: Software engineering concepts and interview-oriented notes.

repos.title: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
repos.description: Comprehensive reference notes and examples on Object-Oriented Programming principles.

articles.title: MTEB: Massive Text Embedding Benchmark
articles.author: Muennighoff et al.
articles.note: Foundation for the embedding evaluation ecosystem I contribute to.

articles.title: MAEB: Massive Audio Embedding Benchmark
articles.author: El Assadi et al.
articles.note: Co-authored; extends MTEB to audio embeddings at scale.

articles.title: Emerging Properties in Self-Supervised Vision Transformers (DINO)
articles.author: Caron et al.
articles.note: The core DINO self-supervised ViT paper—lays the foundation for our DiffusedDINO research.

articles.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
articles.author: Lewis et al.
articles.note: Seminal paper on combining parametric and non-parametric memory for RAG tasks.

articles.title: Attention Is All You Need
articles.author: Vaswani et al.
articles.note: The foundational paper introducing the Transformer architecture.
